attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  WRTA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY 
 ,WRTA.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT  
 ,WRTA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 ,WRTA.BK_COMPANY_CD
 ,WRTA.TRXL_CREDIT_AMT              
 ,WRTA.TRXL_DEBIT_AMT 
 ,WRTA.SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT
 ,WRTA.SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT
 ,WRTA.SK_TRX_ID_INT
 ,WRTA.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,WRTA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WRTA.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,WRTA.FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT
 ,WRTA.FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT 
 ,WRTA.GL_DT
 ,WRTA.TRXL_CURR_CD
 ,WRTA.FUNCTIONAL_CURR_CONVERSION_DT
 ,WRTA.ACCT_CLASS_CD
 ,WRTA.PRDT_INVOICED_QTY
 ,WRTA.REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD
 ,WRTA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
 ,WRTA.GL_POSTED_DT
 ,WRTA.BUNDLE_PRDT_KEY 
 ,WRTA.SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
 ,WRTA.BK_DEAL_ID  	 
 ,WRTA.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,WRTA.ATTRIB_CD                               
 ,WRTA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT      
 ,WRTA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT        
 ,WRTA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DUR_CNT  
 ,WRTA.OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT      
 ,WRTA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                                                 
 ,WRTA.AR_BATCH_SRC_KEY         
 ,WRTA.TRX_CLASS_CD  
 ,WRTA.SS_CD
 ,WRTA.SUBSCR_CD            
 ,WRTA.ATTRIB_PCT                  	
 ,WRTA.TRX_SRC_CD
 ,WRTA.PARENT_OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT    
 ,WRTA.POB_TYPE_CD    
 ,WRTA.EDW_CREATE_DTM                
 ,WRTA.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,WRTA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
 ,WRTA.EDW_UPDATE_USER                                 
 FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE WRTA
  WHERE 
  DML_TYPE='I' AND 
  NOT EXISTS  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NRSDL  
  WHERE NRSDL.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY = WRTA.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY)
